title: phrazo #5419
definition:
1) to indicate plainly, make known, declare, whether by gesture
    or by writing or speaking, or in some other ways
 2) to explain
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to indicate plainly, make known, declare, whether by gesture
    or by writing or speaking, or in some other ways
 2) to explain

    NASB:  to show forth, tell:
